agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: Paying high professional fundraising fees represents a high direct fundraising cost, which reduces the overall log fundraising efficiency metric.
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Thornton (2006) discusses return determinants on fundraising investments.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A statistically significant negative correlation was found. Higher professional fees are associated with lower overall log fundraising efficiency, reflecting that outsourced fundraising is a costly acquisition channel.
